app.title: Bun is being ported from Zig to Rust
app.author: SergeAx
app.description: Bun language being ported to Rust runtime
proposed_tests: Download and compile the Rust version of Bun
Run benchmark tests against the Rust and Zig versions
Compare performance between the two runtimes
